items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: It seems the chaos has seeped into every corner of the Fabricatorium…

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Yes. The Orchestration Altar is behind that pillar.

options.text: The water's not deep. Maybe we could walk it through.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Water? It's the energy source that keeps this site running.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Hold on. I'll orchestrate this area first. Let's see if the path will reveal itself after the mist is cleared.

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: (She's trying to use her Forte again… and she looks better now. Her injuries and Resonance ability are recovering.)

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: (Our alliance hinges on her weakened state. I'm not sure how long it'll take for her to fully recover… but when she does, this fragile pact could end in an instant.)
If this world can't be changed, then maybe it's time to take a different path... even if it's nothing like before.
I'll do whatever it takes to help you achieve your goal. We stand in the same place, and I've already shown you that what you seek is within reach.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: This mist… It's even thicker than before.

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: Things are getting worse in the Lost Beyond?

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: The Sonoro Sphere you created seems to be tied to your life.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Worry not. It won't affect our goal.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: There is always a way forward. Stay close.
